zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Cockayne於1496年出生在英國瓦維其可爾波德斯利時，他的父親Thomas Cokayne17歲，母親Barbara FitzHerbert14歲。他於1522年與Katherine Baddesley在英國瓦維其可爾巴德斯利 恩索結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在英國瓦維其可爾享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cockayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

variants.name: Cocking
meanings: habitational name from Cocking in Sussex. The placename denoted ‘(the settlement of) Cocking's people’, from the Old English personal name Cocca + the group-name suffix -ingas.
patronymic from either of two Middle English personal names, Cok(k)ing (Old English Coccing) or Cokin (probably Old French in origin), both of which are pet forms of Cocke 2.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Cockayne was born in 1496, in Bordesley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thomas Cokayne, was 17 and his mother, Barbara FitzHerbert, was 14. He married Katherine Baddesley in 1522, in Baddesley Ensor, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1556, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 60.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Cockayneが1496年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアボルデスリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Cokayneは17歳，母Barbara FitzHerbertは14歳であった。1522年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバッドエスリー エンソルでKatherine Baddesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Cockayne(이)가 1496년 영국 워윅실르 볼데슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cokayne(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara FitzHerbert(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1522년 영국 워윅실르 바데슬리 소르에서 Katherine Baddesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 영국 워윅실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Cockayne родился в 1496 г. в местности бордесли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Cokayne было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara FitzHerbert, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Baddesley в 1522 г. в местности баддесли энсор, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1556 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
